overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character moves from dark covered walkways through commercial corridors with vibrant neon lighting, passing vending machines and advertisements, before ascending stairs to an elevated plaza with views of towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark covered walkway with red ambient lighting

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading upward on the left side of the walkway
red neon light strips illuminating the ceiling and walls
piles of trash bags and debris scattered on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by red neon strips overhead. The concrete stairs on the left lead upward while trash debris litters the right side of the path. The character walks forward through this enclosed, cyberpunk-style corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with vending machines and food stalls

events.description: lighting shifts from red to cyan and pink neon as the character exits the dark covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and food stalls while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person standing at the vending machine on the right side

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with 'CCOLA' branding and drink selection
food service stall with green lighting and menu displays
tall palm tree visible in the distance marking the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark red-lit corridor into a semi-covered commercial area with mixed neon lighting. Vending machines and food stalls line the walkway while pedestrians move in opposing directions. The environment transitions from enclosed to more open as palm trees become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian corridor with overhead pink lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor toward the large billboard visible at the far end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the billboard at the corridor end

entered.detail: vibrant pink and cyan neon strips running along the ceiling
illuminated digital advertisement poster on the left wall
wooden bench positioned against the left wall
large digital billboard advertising 'Sunny Somalia' with 15% off promotion

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a covered corridor dominated by vibrant pink neon ceiling lights. A large 'Sunny Somalia' billboard is visible at the far end, growing larger as the character approaches. Digital posters and benches line the left wall while the corridor maintains a steady enclosed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with large advertisement billboard

events.description: exits the covered corridor into an open plaza with the large billboard now on the left
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers surrounding the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking around the open plaza and looking up at the surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the base of the billboard

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated advertisements and glass facades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a wide-open plaza dominated by the massive 'Sunny Somalia' billboard now on the left. The camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with glowing advertisements against the night sky. A person sits on a bench near the billboard while concrete stairs on the right lead to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with purple neon lighting

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs to reach the upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs to reach the upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking across the upper plaza

entered.detail: covered walkway structure with vibrant purple neon lighting
palm tree planted in a yellow-bordered planter on the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs illuminated by purple neon lights, reaching an elevated pedestrian walkway. The overhead structure glows with magenta and purple lighting while pedestrians walk across the upper plaza. Skyscrapers remain visible in the background as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of neon-lit urban corridors that gradually open into a vast, elevated city plaza. It begins in a dark, enclosed pedestrian walkway illuminated by red neon strips and littered with debris, moving forward until the space expands into a semi-covered commercial area filled with vending machines and distant palm trees. The scene then shifts back into a corridor dominated by vibrant pink ceiling lights and digital posters, drawing the camera toward a massive Sunny Somalia billboard. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the view opens into a wide plaza where the camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and glowing advertisements against the night sky. Finally, the movement ascends a set of purple-lit concrete stairs to reach an elevated pedestrian walkway glowing with magenta light beneath the city's skyline.
